description: Scaffold packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts/ directory and index.ts barrel
Add @alga-psa/ui/keyboard-shortcuts and /keyboard-shortcuts/* exports to packages/ui/package.json
types.ts: ShortcutAction, ShortcutScope union, BindingDescriptor, ParsedToken (code|char), Platform, PersistedShortcuts shape
platform.ts: client-only platform detection (mac vs other) resolved post-mount, never during SSR

Define ShortcutStorage adapter interface (read/write/subscribe over the persisted keyboard_shortcuts_v1 shape) in packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts/storage.ts; all engine persistence code depends only on this interface

Provide a default in-memory/no-op ShortcutStorage so packages/ui/keyboard-shortcuts works standalone with ZERO @alga-psa/user-composition or feature-package (tickets/billing/assets/projects/...) imports

Dependency-boundary guard: a CI-runnable check that fails if any file under packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts imports @alga-psa/user-composition or any feature package, or if `npx nx graph` introduces a cycle absent from .github/known-cycles.json (aligns with .github/workflows/circular-deps.yml and eslint-plugin-custom-rules)
parseBinding(str): parse modifier set + single key token
parseBinding: classify token as code-kind for letters a-z (→ KeyA..KeyZ)
parseBinding: classify digits (→ Digit0..9) and function keys (F1..F12) as code-kind
parseBinding: classify named keys (Enter, Escape, Tab, Space, ArrowUp/Down/Left/Right, Delete, Backspace, Home, End, PageUp/Down) as code-kind
parseBinding: classify bracket tokens [ ] as code-kind (BracketLeft/BracketRight)
parseBinding: classify glyph tokens (e.g. ?) as char-kind matched on produced character
parseBinding: support `mod` token plus literal `ctrl`/`meta`/`shift`/`alt` modifiers; literal ctrl/meta not remapped across OS
parseBinding: deterministic modifier normalization order and lowercase printable normalization
parseBinding: reject invalid/unsupported syntax with a typed error result
parseSequence(str): parse space-separated chord sequence (e.g. 'g t') into ordered BindingDescriptor[]
matchEvent: resolve mod from platform (Meta on mac, Ctrl on other) at match time
matchEvent: code-kind match via event.code + exact modifier-set equality
matchEvent: char-kind match via event.key produced char; Shift implied by glyph, not separately required
matchEvent: code-kind correctly matches macOS Option+letter (event.key='Dead' but event.code='KeyN')
matchEvent: code-kind correctly matches mod+letter on international layouts (Cyrillic/German physical S)
matchEvent: AltGr (ctrl+alt producing a character) does not false-match mod combos
useKeyboardShortcutRegistry: in-memory registry of actions keyed by id with add/remove
KeyboardShortcutsProvider: single capture-phase keydown listener on document; client-only ('use client')
useShortcutAction(def): register on mount, unregister on unmount; stable id; per-platform defaultBindings {mac,other} with single-array sugar expansion
useShortcutAction: enabled flag gates matching and preventDefault (preventDefault only when an enabled action handles the event)
useShortcutScope(scope): ref-counted push/pop of active scope stack
useShortcutScope: active scopes cleared on route change
Dispatch: skip handling when event.defaultPrevented is true
Dispatch: filter matched actions by active scopes
Dispatch: pick highest priority; tie → most-local active scope (top of stack)
Dispatch: residual tie reported as a conflict (dev/settings), never resolved by silent registration order
Editable-target suppression: input/textarea/select/contenteditable/role=textbox/role=combobox/editor roots
allowInEditable: true opt-in bypasses editable suppression for the action
Active-region API: register/unregister a roving-focus region; selection.* actions fire only when a region is active (single-letter page actions are not region-gated)

KeyboardShortcutsProvider accepts an injected ShortcutStorage (prop/context); defaults to an in-memory adapter — the inversion seam that keeps packages/ui free of user-composition (REOPENED: built but never wired into dispatch/provider/display end-to-end)
Architecture boundary guard: keyboard-shortcuts engine must not import user-composition or feature packages; CI path delegates circular dependency check to known-cycles baseline
Sequence engine: chord buffer accumulates keys and resolves a matching parsed sequence
Sequence engine: configurable timeout (default ~1s) resets the buffer
Sequence engine: buffer resets on non-matching key, scope change, or route change
Sequence engine: suppressed in editable targets (no g-nav while typing)
Sequence engine: single-chord and sequence actions coexist without mutual interference
Radix integration: detect when a Radix modal owns Escape via ModalityContext/InsideDialogContext
Radix integration: dialog.cancel/panel.close route through Radix onEscapeKeyDown semantics; no competing global Escape listener while a Radix modal is open
Radix integration: nested modal Escape does not double-fire (respects existing stopPropagation/nesting fix)
Standard action ID catalog defined (global.*, page.*, selection.*, record.*, drawer.*, editor.*, assets.*, ai.*) with per-platform defaults
Per-platform default for editor.redo: mac=mod+shift+z, other=ctrl+y/ctrl+shift+z
Mount KeyboardShortcutsProvider in MspLayoutClient.tsx wrapping DefaultLayout and AlgaDeskMspShell
Provider not mounted on auth/client-portal screens
global.search action registered; remove window mod+k listener from SearchPalette.tsx; focuses global search as before
global.toggleChat action registered from DefaultLayout.tsx (mod+l), preserving aiAssistantAvailable gating and open/close-or-focus behavior
ai.quickAsk action registered from DefaultLayout.tsx (mod+ArrowUp), preserving aiAssistantAvailable gating and quick-ask/focus behavior
Remove the now-migrated window keydown listener block from DefaultLayout.tsx
global.openShortcuts action registered (default `?`) opening the help dialog
global.quickCreate action registered (default `n`, non-editable, not region-gated) opening QuickCreateDialog
assets.commandPalette action registered page-scoped with a distinct non-mod+k default
Remove window mod+k listener from AssetDashboardClient.tsx; asset palette opens via assets.commandPalette
mod+k resolves only to global.search app-wide (conflict removed)

Register navigation.goTickets/goAssets/goClients in the MSP shell (DefaultLayout) with Next router.push handlers; global scope, sequence bindings g t / g a / g c (catalog defined these but no handler was wired)
panel.close action registered for drawers, Radix-integrated (Escape)
drawer.historyBack / drawer.historyForward actions registered
Migrate server/src/context/DrawerContext.tsx keydown handling to registered actions
Migrate packages/ui/src/context/DrawerContext.tsx keydown handling to registered actions (both contexts migrated together)
Drawer/panel scope pushed while a drawer is open, popped on close (ref-counted)
record.previous / record.next registered defaulting to [ and ] (code-kind)
Alt+ArrowLeft/Right offered only as opt-in alternate bindings for record.previous/next (not default)
Migrate TicketNavigation.tsx adjacent-record nav to record.previous/next; remove its window listener
Drawer/panel scope wins over ticket page scope while a drawer is open
editor scope pushed by invoice designer / workflow designer / rich-text editor roots (ref-counted)
Migrate invoice designer useDesignerShortcuts.ts (undo/redo/delete/escape/arrow-move) into editor-scoped registered actions
editor.undo/redo/save/deleteSelection registered with editor scope and high priority; per-platform redo (F071)
Workflow designer keyboard actions migrated/wrapped into editor scope
Rich-text (BlockNote) editor: editor scope + careful allowInEditable; BlockNote retains its own internal undo/redo (no double-handling)

MSP wrapper (server/user-composition layer) implements a useUserPreference-backed ShortcutStorage (key keyboard_shortcuts_v1; localStorage + debounced server sync) and INJECTS it into KeyboardShortcutsProvider via F043 — the @alga-psa/user-composition import lives here, NOT in packages/ui/keyboard-shortcuts (REOPENED: built but never wired into dispatch/provider/display end-to-end)
Persisted blob is delta-only in platform-neutral syntax (mod + logical tokens), with version and disabled[] fields
Effective binding resolution: userOverride[id] ?? platformDefault(id, platform) (REOPENED: built but never wired into dispatch/provider/display end-to-end)
Drop-equals-default guard: a user value equal to current platform default is removed from storage, not frozen
On load, validate overrides against current platform; surface non-blocking advisory for hostile/reserved combos; never silently rewrite
Versioned blob with migration function (v1 → vN)
disabled[] action list honored in dispatch (disabled actions never fire) (REOPENED: built but never wired into dispatch/provider/display end-to-end)
Unauthenticated path: localStorage-only via useUserPreference skipServerFetch/isUserLoggedIn
Add 'keyboard-shortcuts' tab to SettingsPage.tsx baseTabContent ({id,label,icon:KeyboardIcon,content} wrapped in Card/CardHeader/CardContent)
KeyboardShortcutsSettings.tsx component using shared Card/Table/Switch/Button/LoadingIndicator
Settings: list actions grouped by group with label, description, scope, default, effective binding (resolved for device)
Settings: inline key-capture rebind recording event.code for code-kind and event.key for char-kind (matches matcher)
Settings: clear a custom binding (revert to default)
Settings: disable an action via Switch (writes disabled[])
Settings: reset one action to default (ghost Button + RotateCcw icon)
Settings: reset all shortcuts to defaults behind a ConfirmationDialog (destructive intent)
Settings: inline platform-aware conflict detection before commit; replacing an existing binding requires explicit confirm
Settings: react-hot-toast success + handleError(error, t(...)) failure, consistent with other panels
Settings: LoadingIndicator while preferences load; preference-backed immediate debounced save (no explicit Save button)
Settings: every interactive element has an id; Button variants follow app conventions (default/outline/ghost/destructive)
Review settingsProductTabs.ts allowlist (no change expected for MSP-only); confirm tab visibility correct
ShortcutHelpDialog.tsx using shared Dialog; read-only; active shortcuts only
Help dialog: grouped by group/scope; disabled/unavailable actions hidden
Help dialog: custom (non-default) bindings visually flagged
Help dialog: bindings rendered resolved for current device (post-mount, no hydration mismatch)
Shared <Kbd>/ShortcutHint component renders platform glyphs (⌘/⌥/⇧/⌃ mac; Ctrl/Alt/Shift other) post-mount

Visible kbd hints added to curated key controls (global search field, primary action buttons, relevant menu items) and tooltips (REOPENED: built but never wired into dispatch/provider/display end-to-end)
aria-keyshortcuts mapping layer: convert effective binding to ARIA value format (REOPENED: built but never wired into dispatch/provider/display end-to-end)
aria-keyshortcuts applied to instrumented controls
Create EN namespace file server/public/locales/en/msp/keyboard-shortcuts.json (settings panel, help dialog, conflict/advisory messages chrome)
EN: action label keys for every registered action id (global.*, page.*, selection.*, record.*, drawer.*, editor.*, assets.*, ai.*)
EN: group name keys for every action group
Add 'keyboard-shortcuts' settings-tab label key to en/msp/settings.json
Action registration API takes labelKey/groupKey (i18n keys), not raw strings — enforced from Phase 1
Register msp/keyboard-shortcuts in ROUTE_NAMESPACES (packages/core/src/lib/i18n/config.ts) so it preloads for /msp
French (fr) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Spanish (es) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
German (de) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Dutch (nl) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Italian (it) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Polish (pl) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Portuguese (pt) translations for msp/keyboard-shortcuts + settings-tab label
Regenerate pseudo-locales xx/yy (node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs)
validate-translations.cjs passes for the new namespace and settings-tab key across all locales
Platform glyph labels and aria-keyshortcuts text are localized/locale-safe; no hardcoded user-facing strings in engine/settings/help
Conflict/advisory messages (cross-device hostile-combo notices) internationalized
Regression-safe migration order enforced: each legacy handler removed only after its action is registered and verified
No SSR/hydration mismatch from platform/binding resolution (verified)
Component-local widget key handling (DatePicker, SearchableSelect, TagInput, comboboxes, Radix internals) unaffected by the system

Catalog: add page.create (scope page, default ['c'], non-editable, not region-gated); register mod+n as a configurable OPTIONAL_ALTERNATE_BINDING with a documented 'browser may intercept (new window)' note; keep page.save default ['mod+s']
usePageCreateShortcut(handler,{labelKey}) helper: a page registers page.create wired to its own Create/New button or dialog; page scope wins over global.quickCreate while mounted
usePageSaveShortcut(handler) helper: registers page.save (mod+s, preventDefault browser save) wired to the page's primary Save action
Wire page.create on the Tickets list page (opens Create Ticket)
Wire page.create on the Clients list page (opens Create Client)
Wire page.create on the Contacts list page (opens Create Contact)
Wire page.create on the Interactions surface (opens Create Interaction)
Wire page.create on the Projects list page (opens Create Project)
Wire page.create on the Assets list page (opens Create Asset)
Wire page.save on primary editable detail/form pages that expose a Save button (e.g. ticket/client/project detail)
page.create/page.save suppressed in editable targets and when a dialog/drawer owns scope; global.quickCreate is the fallback only when no page.create is registered for the route
i18n: labelKey/groupKey for page.create & page.save in en + fr/es/de/nl/it/pl/pt + pseudo; validate-translations.cjs passes
Shared create-dialog a11y contract: on open focus the first interactive field; on close restore focus to the invoking control
Focus trap: Tab/Shift+Tab cycle stays within the dialog; background not reachable while open
mod+Enter submits the create form (textarea/BlockNote-safe); plain Enter submits from single-line inputs where unambiguous
Escape cancels/closes the create dialog, Radix-integrated (respects nesting/ModalityContext)
Every control (selects, date/time pickers, comboboxes, toggles) in the create dialogs is reachable and operable keyboard-only
Apply the a11y contract to the Create Ticket dialog
Apply the a11y contract to the Create Client dialog
Apply the a11y contract to the Create Contact dialog
Apply the a11y contract to the Create Interaction dialog
Apply the a11y contract to the Create Project and Create Asset dialogs
Create dialogs expose role=dialog/aria-modal/aria-labelledby; screen-reader announces title and first field
Command palette overlay (Spotlight) component, fully keyboard-driven (Up/Down/Enter/Escape, no mouse needed); shared, i18n-ready

Binding: mod+k opens the command palette. SUPERSEDES the prior 'mod+k focuses sidebar search' — palette's default free-text mode includes record search so existing behavior is preserved/enhanced; asset palette stays rescoped (mod+shift+k)
Result providers merged & ranked: navigation destinations (from menuConfig), registered shortcut actions (runnable commands), and record search (existing app search)
Pure, UI-decoupled query parser module (mirrors parser/matcher discipline); unit-tested; obeys the architecture-guard import boundary
TeamCity-style field-scoped syntax field:value with a field registry + short aliases (e.g. ticket:/t:, client:/c:, project:/p:, asset:/a:, user:/u:/@, nav:/ , action:>)
Operators: double-quoted phrases; - / NOT exclusion; * and ? wildcards (not leading *); prefix-match default; OR default between unscoped terms; AND only within the same field scope
Magic $ keywords abbreviated to first syllable (e.g. $mine/$m, $recent/$rec, $open) à la TeamCity $pinned/$p
Special leading sigils: > run action/command, # open by record id/number, @ people, / navigation
Selecting a result navigates / runs the action / opens the record; empty query shows recent + primary nav; recents and frequency boost ranking
Palette is a registered shortcut action (global scope) so it appears in help and is rebindable; default mod+k per F341
i18n: palette chrome, field names, placeholders, syntax help in en + 7 locales + pseudo; ROUTE_NAMESPACES updated if a new namespace; validate-translations.cjs passes
a11y: combobox/listbox roles, aria-activedescendant, result-count live region, visible kbd hints; no SSR/hydration mismatch
In-palette syntax help (field list + operators + $keywords + sigils); global help dialog links to it
Dependency-boundary guard extended to the palette module (no @alga-psa/user-composition or feature-package imports; npx nx graph shows no new cycle)

MspLayoutClient calls useKeyboardShortcutPreferenceStorage() and passes it as the provider `storage` prop (and derives disabledActionIds from it) — the inversion seam is actually connected at the mount site
Provider loads PersistedShortcuts from the injected storage and keeps it reactive (re-resolves when the adapter value changes), holding it as the single source of preference state

collectSingleChordCandidates & collectSequenceCandidates resolve via resolveActionBindings(actionId, action.defaultBindings, preferences)[platform] instead of normalizeDefaultBindings(defaults) — a rebind dispatches the new combo and the old default stops firing
Provider merges preferences.disabled into the dispatch disabled set (in addition to the disabledActionIds prop) so disabled actions never fire and are hidden from help
Provider exposes resolved-binding accessor + preferences + mutators (setActionBindings/setActionDisabled/reset-one/reset-all) via KeyboardShortcutsContext as the single source of truth
display.tsx ShortcutHint & useAriaKeyShortcuts consume the provider's resolved binding from context (not getDefaultBindingsForPlatform) so visible kbd hints and aria-keyshortcuts reflect overrides

KeyboardShortcutsSettings consumes the provider context instead of its own separate useUserPreference instance, so rebind/disable/reset live-update dispatch + hints + the settings table from one source

Add a catalog-derived action factory (createShortcutAction(id, handler, opts?) / useCatalogShortcut) that derives scope/priority/defaultBindings/labelKey/groupKey/sequence/allowInEditable from SHORTCUT_ACTION_CATALOG; callers pass only id + handler (+ optional runtime enabled)

Migrate every registration site (SearchPalette, DefaultLayout, server + packages/ui DrawerContext, TicketNavigation, AssetDashboardClient, useDesignerShortcuts) to the catalog factory and delete hand-authored metadata literals, including useDesignerShortcuts priority:60 and the sites that omit priority (runtime 0) and contradict catalog DEFAULT_PRIORITY

Catalog-drift guard: a unit test plus an extension of guard-keyboard-shortcuts-boundary.mjs fails when a registered/used action id is absent from the catalog or its scope/priority/sequence/bindings diverge from the catalog entry

DefaultLayout no longer calls useShortcutActiveRegion(true) unconditionally; a shared roving-focus region wrapper/hook is provided and applied only to genuine list/selection containers that own j/k/Enter/c semantics

selection.* actions (j/k/Enter) are inert on arbitrary non-editable focus across /msp and fire only when a real roving-focus region is active (requiresActiveRegion satisfied only by F370 regions); single-letter page actions (c/n) are not region-gated

Replace/augment the readFileSync+toContain *.contract.test.ts suites (global-migration, panels-drawers, editors, persistence-bridge, settings-ui, regression, i18n) with behavioral tests asserting observable dispatch/registration/resolution; keep a minimal source smoke only where behavior cannot be simulated
Meta test-guard fails any new *.contract.test.ts that only uses readFileSync+toContain with no behavioral assertion

Profile presets in engine single source: PersistedShortcuts gains profile (schema v2 with v1->v2 migration); SHORTCUT_PROFILES ships default/vim/emacs with parser-valid neutral single-chord deltas keyed by real catalog ids; resolveActionBindings = user override -> profile delta -> platform default; setActionBindingsDelta drops overrides equal to the profile baseline so per-action reset returns to active profile baseline

Provider context exposes profile + setProfile (preferencesRef-driven, persisted via setProfilePreference); useKeyboardShortcutPreferences / useOptionalKeyboardShortcutPreferences include them so the panel and any hint consumers see one source

KeyboardShortcutsPanel.tsx visual-keyboard cheatsheet (variation-c handoff) driven by real catalog + provider single source: KB_ROWS grid, layer toggle with counts, category-tinted bound keys with conflict dots, hover/selection KeyDetail strip (scope chip, Modified badge, Switch, BindingDisplay, Rebind/Cancel, per-action Reset), chord rail with search and Reset-all-to-profile footer, real keydown capture, prompt-to-reassign ConfirmationDialog conflict UX, Copy cheatsheet, react-hot-toast + handleError, every interactive element has an id; unmappable keys (?, Escape, Delete, sequences) route to the chord rail instead of disappearing

Placement moved to Profile: KeyboardShortcutsPanel rendered as a CustomTabs sub-tab in UserProfile.tsx tabContent; SettingsPage.tsx tab entry and Keyboard icon import removed; old KeyboardShortcutsSettings.tsx deleted; 'keyboard-shortcuts' added to BASE_PROFILE_TABS so /msp/profile?tab=keyboard-shortcuts deep-links resolve

Behavioral tests + contract updates: profiles.test.ts covers profile resolution (default/vim/emacs), override-wins, baseline-drop semantics, normalizeProfileId, v1->v2 migration; settings-ui.contract.test.ts rewritten to assert UserProfile placement, deleted old panel, panel single-source wiring, real capture/conflict/reset/profile ids; i18n.contract.test.ts updated to assert profile.tabs.keyboardShortcuts in EN profile.json and the SettingsPage no longer references the tab

EN-first i18n for the new placement: profile.tabs.keyboardShortcuts added to all production locales' msp/profile.json (EN value as interim placeholder for non-EN languages) for key parity; pseudo-locales regenerated via generate-pseudo-locales.cjs; validate-translations.cjs passes; panel chrome uses t() defaultValue fallbacks pending the full 8-locale translation pass

FOLLOW-UP (implemented:false): translate panel chrome keys (settings.*, profiles.*, legend.*, settings.chords.*, settings.conflict.*, settings.actions.*) into the 7 non-EN production locales and regenerate pseudo; today the panel renders via defaultValue fallbacks in non-EN locales
